title: Authors and Citation

code: @Manual{,   title = {yakuba: Access the Drosophila yakuba FlyEM Dataset},   author = {Gregory Jefferis},   year = {2026},   note = {R package version 0.0.0.9000},   url = {https://github.com/flyconnectome/yakuba}, }

what: Access the Drosophila yakuba FlyEM Dataset
title: Access the Drosophila yakuba FlyEM Dataset
text: yakuba thin wrapper around malevnc working Drosophila yakuba male VNC connectome dataset style malecns. dataset currently progress mode targeting Autumn 2026 release. Principal collaborators include Hiroshi Shiozaki David Stern, Janelia FlyEM team / inc Stuart Berg, Wyatt Korff colleagues, Janelia Marta Costa colleagues, Drosophila Connectomics Group, University Cambridge Greg Jefferis, MRC LMB & University Cambridge Kathi Eichler, University Leipzig Michał Januszewski, Google initial package focuses : dataset selection helpers neuprint metadata connectivity queries body id lookup body annotation neuron skeletons bridging registration MANC

title: Access the Drosophila yakuba FlyEM Dataset
text: example shows read descending neurons co-visualise corresponding neurons MANC.
code: library(malevnc) library(nat) library(nat.templatebrains)  MANC.tissue.surf.yak = nat.templatebrains::xform_brain(   MANC.tissue.surf,   sample = "MANC",   reference = "yakuba" ) wire3d(MANC.tissue.surf.yak)  dna02 = read_dyak_neurons("DNa02") plot3d(dna02, lwd = 3)  # nb the default template space for MANC is calibrated in microns # but for yakuba we use nm dna02.manc = malevnc::manc_read_neurons("DNa02", units = "microns") dna02.manc.yak = nat.templatebrains::xform_brain(   dna02.manc,   reference = "yakuba",   sample = "MANC" ) # set up nice coords for the plot par3d(zoom=0.458,       windowRect=c(0, 44, 800, 400+44),       userMatrix=matrix(c(         0.033, -0.999,  0.026, 0,         0.139, -0.022, -0.990, 0,         0.990,  0.036,  0.138, 0,         0.000,  0.000,  0.000, 1       ), ncol=4)) plot3d(dna02.manc.yak, col = "black", lwd = 2)

what: Switch the default dataset for dyak_* functions — choose_dyak_dataset
title: Switch the default dataset for dyak_* functions — choose_dyak_dataset
text: choose_dyak_dataset() sets default dataset used dyak_* functions. recommended way access yakuba dataset variants. Unlike choose_dyak() permanently change default dataset used callers use functions malevnc package directly (malevnc::manc_xyz2bodyid()).

title: Switch the default dataset for dyak_* functions — choose_dyak_dataset
code: choose_dyak_dataset(dataset = "yakuba")

title: Switch the default dataset for dyak_* functions — choose_dyak_dataset
text: dataset name dataset reported Clio (usually yakuba), neuprint (yakuba-vnc). aliases progress production yakuba dataset. Currently released datasets, expect look like e.g. yakuba-vnc:v0.1.

title: Switch the default dataset for dyak_* functions — choose_dyak_dataset
text: named list previous option values, matching options().

title: Switch the default dataset for dyak_* functions — choose_dyak_dataset
code: # \donttest{ choose_dyak_dataset("yakuba") #> Error in clio_auth(): Clio/Google auth failure. Do you have access rights to VNC clio? #> Try specifying the email linked to clio in a call to `clio_auth` or setting `options(malevnc.clio_email)`! dyak_ids("DNa02") #> Error in clio_auth(): Clio/Google auth failure. Do you have access rights to VNC clio? #> Try specifying the email linked to clio in a call to `clio_auth` or setting `options(malevnc.clio_email)`! # }

what: Return neurojson body annotations via the Clio interface — dyak_body_annotations

text: Return neurojson body annotations via Clio interface

title: Return neurojson body annotations via the Clio interface — dyak_body_annotations
code: dyak_body_annotations(   ids = NULL,   query = NULL,   json = FALSE,   config = NULL,   show.extra = c("none", "user", "time", "all"),   cache = FALSE,   test = FALSE,   ...,   dataset = dyak_default_dataset() )

title: Return neurojson body annotations via the Clio interface — dyak_body_annotations
text: ids set body ids form understandable manc_ids query json query string (see examples documentation) R list field names elements. json Whether return unparsed JSON rather R list (default FALSE). config optional httr::config (expert use , must include bearer token) show.extra Extra columns show user/timestamp information. cache Whether cache result call 5 minutes. test Whether unset clio-store test server (default FALSE) ... Additional arguments passed pbapply::pblapply dataset name dataset reported Clio e.g. yakuba, yakuba-vnc etc. yakuba, yakuba-vnc yakubavnc treated aliases main yakuba dataset.

title: Return neurojson body annotations via the Clio interface — dyak_body_annotations
text: data frame metadata.

title: Return neurojson body annotations via the Clio interface — dyak_body_annotations
text: comparison dyak_neuprint_meta(), provides access second annotations; also presently faster call. Compared dyak_neuprint_meta(), produce stable set columns, returning exist given query ids.

title: Return neurojson body annotations via the Clio interface — dyak_body_annotations
code: # \donttest{ dyak_body_annotations("DNa02") #> Error in clio_auth(): Clio/Google auth failure. Do you have access rights to VNC clio? #> Try specifying the email linked to clio in a call to `clio_auth` or setting `options(malevnc.clio_email)`! # }

what: Connectivity query for yakuba neurons — dyak_connection_table
title: Connectivity query for yakuba neurons — dyak_connection_table
text: Connectivity query yakuba neurons

title: Connectivity query for yakuba neurons — dyak_connection_table
code: dyak_connection_table(   ids,   partners = c("inputs", "outputs"),   moredetails = c("class", "group", "type", "somaSide", "somaNeuromere", "hemilineage"),   summary = FALSE,   threshold = 1L,   roi = NULL,   by.roi = FALSE,   conn = NULL,   ...,   dataset = dyak_default_dataset() )

title: Connectivity query for yakuba neurons — dyak_connection_table
text: ids set body ids (see dyak_ids() range ways specify ). partners Either inputs outputs. Redundant prepost, probably clearer. moredetails Either logical (add fields TRUE) character vector naming additional fields returned dyak_neuprint_meta() added results data frame. summary TRUE one query neuron given, summarises connectivity grouped partner. threshold return partners >= integer value. Default 1 returns partners. threshold applied ROI weight roi argument specified, otherwise whole neuron. roi single ROI. Use neuprint_ROIs see available. .roi logical, whether break neurons' connectivity region interest (ROI) conn Optional, neuprint_connection object. Defaults dyak_neuprint() ensure query yakuba dataset. ... additional arguments passed neuprint_connection_table dataset name dataset reported Clio e.g. yakuba, yakuba-vnc etc. yakuba, yakuba-vnc yakubavnc treated aliases main yakuba dataset.

title: Connectivity query for yakuba neurons — dyak_connection_table
text: data frame.

Do you have access rights to VNC clio? #> Try specifying the email linked to clio in a call to `clio_auth` or setting `options(malevnc.clio_email)`! # }

title: Get yakuba ids in standard formats — dyak_ids
text: ids Either numeric ids (character, numeric, integer integer64 format) query expression. mustWork Whether insist least one valid id returned (default TRUE) as_character Whether return segments character rather numeric vector (default character safety). integer64 whether return ids class bit64::integer64. unique Whether ensure unique ids returned (default TRUE) ... Additional arguments passed malevnc::manc_ids(). dataset name dataset reported Clio neuprint.

title: Get yakuba ids in standard formats — dyak_ids
text: vector numeric ids mode determined as_character integer64.

Do you have access rights to VNC clio? #> Try specifying the email linked to clio in a call to `clio_auth` or setting `options(malevnc.clio_email)`! ids #> Error: object 'ids' not found dyak_ids("DNa02", integer64 = TRUE) #> Error in clio_auth(): Clio/Google auth failure. Do you have access rights to VNC clio? #> Try specifying the email linked to clio in a call to `clio_auth` or setting `options(malevnc.clio_email)`! # }

title: Login to yakuba neuprint server — dyak_neuprint
text: token neuprint authorisation token obtained e.g. neuprint.janelia.org website. dataset Allows override neuprint dataset dyak_neuprint() (otherwise chosen based value options(yakuba.dataset), normally changed choose_dyak_dataset()). Force Passed neuprintr::neuprint_login(). ... Additional arguments passed neuprint_login

title: Login to yakuba neuprint server — dyak_neuprint
text: neuprint_connection object returned neuprintr::neuprint_login().

title: Login to yakuba neuprint server — dyak_neuprint
text: possible use token across public private neuprint servers using email address. However seem work users. giving , try using recently issued token private server rather older tokens. need pass specific token can use token argument, also setting Force=TRUE ensure specified token used already tried log current session.

title: Login to yakuba neuprint server — dyak_neuprint
code: # \donttest{ conn <- dyak_neuprint() #> Error in clio_auth(): Clio/Google auth failure. Do you have access rights to VNC clio? #> Try specifying the email linked to clio in a call to `clio_auth` or setting `options(malevnc.clio_email)`! conn #> Error: object 'conn' not found # }

what: Fetch neuprint metadata for yakuba neurons — dyak_neuprint_meta

text: Fetch neuprint metadata yakuba neurons

title: Fetch neuprint metadata for yakuba neurons — dyak_neuprint_meta
code: dyak_neuprint_meta(   ids = NULL,   conn = NULL,   roiInfo = FALSE,   simplify.xyz = TRUE,   cache = NA,   ...,   dataset = dyak_default_dataset() )

title: Fetch neuprint metadata for yakuba neurons — dyak_neuprint_meta
text: ids body ids. missing bodies known DVID returned. conn Optional, neuprint_connection object. Defaults dyak_neuprint() ensure query yakuba dataset. roiInfo whether include roiInfo field detailing synapse numbers different locations. omitted default returned character vector unprocessed JSON. simplify.xyz Whether simplify columns containing XYZ locations simple "x,y,z" format rather longer form referencing schema spatialreference.org. Defaults TRUE. cache whether cache query. cache=NA (default) queries cached neuprint snapshot versions (production datasets). See details. ... Additional arguments passed neuprint_get_meta dataset name dataset reported Clio neuprint.

title: Fetch neuprint metadata for yakuba neurons — dyak_neuprint_meta
text: data frame one row unique input id NAs columns except bodyid neuprint holds metadata.

Do you have access rights to VNC clio? #> Try specifying the email linked to clio in a call to `clio_auth` or setting `options(malevnc.clio_email)`! # }

title: Read neuronal skeletons via neuprint — read_dyak_neurons
text: ids bodyids form compatible malevnc::manc_ids(). connectors Whether fetch synaptic connections neuron (default FALSE contrast neuprintr::neuprint_read_neurons()). units Units returned neurons (default nm). heal.threshold threshold healing disconnected skeleton fragments. default Inf ensures fragments joined together. conn Optional, neuprint_connection object. Defaults dyak_neuprint() ensure query yakuba dataset. ... Additional arguments passed neuprintr::neuprint_read_neurons(). dataset name dataset reported Clio neuprint.

title: Read neuronal skeletons via neuprint — read_dyak_neurons
text: nat::neuronlist object containing one neurons.

what: Evaluate an expression after temporarily setting malevnc options — with_dyak
title: Evaluate an expression after temporarily setting malevnc options — with_dyak
text: yakuba thin wrapper around malevnc. function temporarily changes server/dataset options malevnc running expression. choose_dyak() swaps default malevnc dataset yakuba dataset. means functions malevnc package target yakuba instead. recommended use with_dyak() temporarily unless intention using FlyEM datasets. switch default yakuba dataset please see choose_dyak_dataset().

title: Evaluate an expression after temporarily setting malevnc options — with_dyak
code: with_dyak(expr, dataset = dyak_default_dataset())  choose_dyak(dataset = dyak_default_dataset(), set = TRUE)

title: Evaluate an expression after temporarily setting malevnc options — with_dyak
text: expr expression involving malevnc/yakuba functions evaluate specified autosegmentation. dataset name dataset reported Clio neuprint. set Whether set relevant package options just return list required options.

title: Evaluate an expression after temporarily setting malevnc options — with_dyak
text: with_dyak() returns result expr. choose_dyak_dataset() choose_dyak() return named lists previous option values, matching options().

title: Evaluate an expression after temporarily setting malevnc options — with_dyak
text: Note can also temporarily switch active dataset yakuba package specify dataset argument different current active dataset. allows easily run expression different yakuba dataset variants.

title: Evaluate an expression after temporarily setting malevnc options — with_dyak
code: # \donttest{ with_dyak(dyak_ids("DNa02")) #> Error in clio_auth(): Clio/Google auth failure. Do you have access rights to VNC clio? #> Try specifying the email linked to clio in a call to `clio_auth` or setting `options(malevnc.clio_email)`!  old <- choose_dyak("yakuba", set = FALSE) #> Error in clio_auth(): Clio/Google auth failure. Do you have access rights to VNC clio? #> Try specifying the email linked to clio in a call to `clio_auth` or setting `options(malevnc.clio_email)`! str(old) #> Error: object 'old' not found # }

what: yakuba: Access the Drosophila yakuba FlyEM Dataset — yakuba-package
title: yakuba: Access the Drosophila yakuba FlyEM Dataset — yakuba-package
text: Provides thin wrapper around 'malevnc' package working Drosophila yakuba male VNC neuprint annotation datasets.

title: yakuba: Access the Drosophila yakuba FlyEM Dataset — yakuba-package
text: yakuba registers bundled thin-plate spline transform yakubaum MANC package startup nat.templatebrains available. simple scaling alias also added yakuba (nm) yakubaum (microns), nat.templatebrains::xform_brain() can chain yakuba MANC. Note current registration (lives inst/extdata) computed Sebastian Cachero April 2025. See slack details

title: yakuba: Access the Drosophila yakuba FlyEM Dataset — yakuba-package
text: currently one package option: yakuba.dataset keeps track active yakuba dataset. can use run code production yakuba dataset future snapshot variants. main ways : Use with_dyak() run one expression without changing default yakuba dataset. Use choose_dyak_dataset() choose default yakuba dataset rest session. Expert users may set yakuba.dataset option directly .Rprofile.

title: yakuba: Access the Drosophila yakuba FlyEM Dataset — yakuba-package
text: Maintainer: Gregory Jefferis jefferis@gmail.com (ORCID)

title: yakuba: Access the Drosophila yakuba FlyEM Dataset — yakuba-package
code: # \donttest{ options()[grepl("^yakuba", names(options()))] #> $yakuba.dataset #> [1] "yakuba" #>  # }  # \donttest{ library(malevnc) library(nat) #> Loading required package: rgl #> Some nat functions depend on a CMTK installation. See ?cmtk and README.md for details. #>  #> Attaching package: ‘nat’ #> The following object is masked from ‘package:rgl’: #>  #>     wire3d #> The following objects are masked from ‘package:base’: #>  #>     intersect, setdiff, union library(nat.templatebrains)  MANC.tissue.surf.yak = nat.templatebrains::xform_brain(   MANC.tissue.surf,   sample = "MANC",   reference = "yakuba" ) #> Error in loadNamespace(x): there is no package called ‘Morpho’ wire3d(MANC.tissue.surf.yak) #> Error: object 'MANC.tissue.surf.yak' not found  dna02 = read_dyak_neurons("DNa02") #> Error in clio_auth(): Clio/Google auth failure. Do you have access rights to VNC clio? #> Try specifying the email linked to clio in a call to `clio_auth` or setting `options(malevnc.clio_email)`! plot3d(dna02, lwd = 3) #> Error: object 'dna02' not found  # nb the default template space for MANC is calibrated in microns # but for yakuba we use nm dna02.manc = malevnc::manc_read_neurons("DNa02", units = "microns") #> Error in (function (path, body = NULL, server = NULL, conf = NULL, parse.json = TRUE,     include_headers = TRUE, simplifyVector = FALSE, app = NULL,     ...) {    if (is.null(app))         app = paste0("neuprintr/", utils::packageVersion("neuprintr"))    req <- if (is.null(body)) {        httr::GET(url = file.path(server, path, fsep = "/"),             config = conf, httr::user_agent(app), ...)    }    else {        httr::POST(url = file.path(server, path, fsep = "/"),             body = body, config = conf, httr::user_agent(app),             ...)    }    neuprint_error_check(req)    if (parse.json) {        parsed = neuprint_parse_json(req, simplifyVector = simplifyVector)        if (length(parsed) == 2 && isTRUE(names(parsed)[2] ==             "error")) {            stop("neuPrint error: ", parsed$error)        }        if (include_headers) {            fields_to_include = c("url", "headers")            attributes(parsed) = c(attributes(parsed), req[fields_to_include])        }        parsed    }    else req})(path = path, body = body, server = server, conf = conf, parse.json = parse.json,     include_headers = include_headers, simplifyVector = simplifyVector,     app = app): Unauthorized (HTTP 401). Failed to process url: https://neuprint.janelia.org/api/dbmeta/datasets with neuPrint error: Please provide valid credentials. dna02.manc.yak = nat.templatebrains::xform_brain(   dna02.manc,   reference = "yakuba",   sample = "MANC" ) #> Error: object 'dna02.manc' not found # set up nice coords for the plot plot3d(dna02.manc.yak, col = "black", lwd = 2) #> Error: object 'dna02.manc.yak' not found #' # }

title: Set Clio body annotations — yakuba_annotate_body
text: Set Clio body annotations

title: Set Clio body annotations — yakuba_annotate_body
code: yakuba_annotate_body(   x,   test = TRUE,   version = NULL,   write_empty_fields = FALSE,   designated_user = NULL,   protect = c("user"),   chunksize = 50,   check_types = TRUE,   ...,   dataset = dyak_default_dataset() )

title: Set Clio body annotations — yakuba_annotate_body
text: x data frame, list JSON string containing body annotations. End users strongly recommended use data frames. test Whether use test Clio store (recommended sure know ). version Optional Clio version associate annotation. default NULL uses current version returned API. write_empty_fields x data frame, controls whether empty fields x overwrite fields Clio database. designated_user Optional alternate user recorded Clio annotation. protect Vector fields overwritten already value Clio. Set TRUE protect fields FALSE overwrite fields provide data. chunksize many bodies annotate request default sent 50 records time avoid timeouts. Set Inf insist records sent single request. check_types Whether verify data-frame column types active yakuba Clio schema. ... Additional parameters passed pbapply::pbsapply(). dataset name dataset reported Clio neuprint.

title: Set Clio body annotations — yakuba_annotate_body
text: NULL invisibly success. Errors failure.

title: Set Clio body annotations — yakuba_annotate_body
text: Details Clio body annotation system provided malevnc::manc_annotate_body(). can take time apply annotations, requests chunked default groups 50. single column called position 3 columns named x, y, z X, Y, Z form accepted nat::xyzmatrix() converted position stored record. recommended creating records. protect=TRUE data Clio overwritten, new data added. protect=FALSE fields overwritten new data non-empty value x. write_empty_fields=TRUE even empty fields x overwrite fields database.

title: Set Clio body annotations — yakuba_annotate_body
text: Validation depends provide input data. x data frame row checked basics including presence bodyid, empty fields removed. also check field types active yakuba Clio schema default.

title: Set Clio body annotations — yakuba_annotate_body
text: Clio records user timestamp every modification fields record. default email address Clio token used. can specify alternate user designated_user argument; see malevnc::manc_annotate_body() details.

title: Set Clio body annotations — yakuba_annotate_body
code: # \donttest{ ids <- dyak_ids("DNa02") #> Error in clio_auth(): Clio/Google auth failure. Do you have access rights to VNC clio? #> Try specifying the email linked to clio in a call to `clio_auth` or setting `options(malevnc.clio_email)`! yakuba_annotate_body(   data.frame(bodyid = ids[1], group = ids[1]),   test = TRUE ) #> Error: object 'ids' not found # }

what: Register yakuba and MANC TPS transforms — yakuba_register_xforms
title: Register yakuba and MANC TPS transforms — yakuba_register_xforms
text: yakuba_register_xforms() registers thin-plate spline transform yakubaum MANC using bundled yakuba_MANC_1000pts_tps.rds file, adds simple scaling alias yakuba (nm) yakubaum (microns). Call per session startup hook already done .

title: Register yakuba and MANC TPS transforms — yakuba_register_xforms
code: yakuba_register_xforms()

title: Register yakuba and MANC TPS transforms — yakuba_register_xforms
text: Invisibly returns NULL.

title: Register yakuba and MANC TPS transforms — yakuba_register_xforms
code: # \donttest{ library(malevnc) library(nat) library(nat.templatebrains) yakuba_register_xforms()  MANC.tissue.surf.yak <- xform_brain(MANC.tissue.surf, sample = "MANC",   reference = "yakuba") #> Error in loadNamespace(x): there is no package called ‘Morpho’ wire3d(MANC.tissue.surf.yak) #> Error: object 'MANC.tissue.surf.yak' not found # }
